# Natalizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Natalizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Natalizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Natalizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Tyruko is indicated as single disease modifying therapy in adults with highly active relapsing remitting multiple sclerosis (RRMS) for the following patient groups: Patients with highly active...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>bronchitis（99.5%）</li>
<li>parapsoriasis（99.4%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">psoriasis（99.2%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 psoriasis</span></li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.2%）</li>
<li>acute lichenoid pityriasis（99.0%）</li>
<li>pityriasis lichenoides（98.7%）</li>
<li>penile fibromatosis（98.4%）</li>
<li>pustulosis palmaris et plantaris（98.3%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（98.2%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（97.7%）</li>
<li>palmar fibromatosis（97.7%）</li>
<li>Ledderhose disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（97.7%）</li>
<li>secondary interstitial lung disease specific to childhood associated with a connective tissue disease（97.6%）</li>
<li>amyopathic dermatomyositis（97.6%）</li>
<li>acne keloid（97.6%）</li>
<li>infantile digital fibromatosis（97.6%）</li>
<li>psoriasis 14, pustular（97.6%）</li>
<li>hydroa vacciniforme, familial（97.2%）</li>
<li>inflammatory bowel disease（97.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/natalizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
